title: EzyShield policy.yaml
description: Enforcement policy: thresholds, strike escalation, allowlists. 'armed: false' means dry-run mode — nothing is blocked.

armed.description: When false (default), the full pipeline runs but nothing is enforced (dry-run). Set true only after verifying with 'ezyshield doctor'.

ban_threshold.description: Score >= this value triggers a strike. Default: 70.

observe_threshold.description: Score in [observe_threshold, ban_threshold) triggers log/notify only. Default: 40.

strikes.description: Strike escalation table. Omit to use the default: 5m, 1h, 24h, 168h, permanent.

oneOf.description: Ban duration as a Go duration string (e.g. '5m', '24h').

max_bans_per_minute.description: Global safety rate limit. Exceeding it pauses enforcement and sends a critical alert. Default: 30.

escalation_exempt_window.description: Escalations (strike > 1) skip max_bans_per_minute only when the previous ban ended within this window. Default: 24h; values above 168h are clamped down.

ban_ineffective_grace.description: Grace period after a ban before suppressed events count toward the ban_ineffective diagnostic. Floor and default: 90s; lower values are raised.

ban_ineffective_min_events.description: Suppressed events after the grace period that trigger the ban_ineffective diagnostic. Floor and default: 3; lower values are raised.

allowlist.description: IPs and CIDRs that can never be banned. The allowlist wins over every other decision.

admin_cidrs.description: CIDR ranges merged into the runtime allowlist at startup and before every ban.

block_countries.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes whose traffic gets an immediate score boost (+100) toward ban_threshold. Requires GeoIP enrichment; silently skipped when enrichment is inactive.

block_asns.description: Autonomous system numbers to block. Same score-boost semantics as block_countries; requires GeoIP/ASN enrichment.
